description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-search` (T2-31). 3/6 libraries. NOTE: PR #175 required.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-search/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, `type="search"` input typing, clear button typing, submit event typing
2. Accessibility — `role="search"` landmark on wrapper, input `type="search"`, clear button has `aria-label`, search icon is decorative, Escape clears, Enter submits, axe-core pass
3. Tests — typing, clear button, Escape clears, Enter submits hx-search event, form association
4. Storybook — default, with placeholder, loading state, with results count
5. CSS — search icon, clear button, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — form GET action compatible, Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-search/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-search — T2-31 antagonistic quality review
